name: Chinese Beef and Beans
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Frozen French style green beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the steak diagonally into thin strips.
2. In a bowl, combine the contents of the gravy mix, soy sauce, sugar, and ginger.
3. Pour the mixture over the meat; toss to cover.
4. Heat half of the oil in a large skillet.
5. Add the green beans and cook, stirring, for 5 minutes until tender and crisp. Remove from the pan.
6. Heat the remaining oil in the same pan.
7. Add the steak and cook for 3 to 5 minutes, stirring, until brown.
8. Add the beans and water. Cook, stirring, until heated through.
9. Serve over hot rice.
